title: [codereview-pass1] LICHEN_TDMA Kconfig select LICHEN_RPL added but help text does not document the new select or updated dependency implications per AGENTS.md
description: The Kconfig change added select LICHEN_RPL to enforce the TDMA->RPL dependency from the init graph. However, the help text still only mentions depends on and does not update acceptance criteria or reference the bead project-LICHEN-majo.1. This is a P4 documentation completeness issue. File as codereview-tagged. Parent project-LICHEN-majo.1
